title: AOT refactor baseline
body:
Introduces the AOT compilation refactor baseline in the compiler workspace—separating ahead-of-time codegen paths from earlier prototype JIT assumptions.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`8079b2e`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/8079b2e)
- **Subject:** AOT Refactor
- **Completed:** 2026-03-17

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-compiler-parity`

## Relation
Required groundwork for stable `beskid build` / release binaries in v0.1.
